  "items": [
    {
      "basic": {
        "name": "醉翁亭记",
        "type": "LITERATURE",
        "countryName": "中国",
        "year": 1046,
        "ontologyVersion": "v1.0",
        "promptVersion": "CPR-1.2",
        "annotationModelVersion": "GPT-5.5",
        "generatorDate": "2026-04-12",
        "annotationLanguage": "zh-CN",
        "evidenceVersion": "v1.0",
        "confidence": 0.95,
        "primaryMediaType": "LITERATURE"
      },
      "semantic": {
        "summary": "北宋欧阳修贬谪滁州期间所作游记散文。文章以“醉翁之意不在酒，在乎山水之间”开篇，描绘琅琊山四时朝暮之景，记述与滁人同游宴饮之乐，将政治失意升华为寄情山水、与民同乐的旷达心境。语言精炼隽永，骈散结合，是中国古代山水游记的典范。",
        "themes": [
          "山水之乐",
          "与民同乐",
          "贬谪与超脱",
          "自然与心灵"
        ],
        "keywords": [
          "醉翁亭",
          "欧阳修",
          "滁州",
          "琅琊山",
          "酿泉",
          "山水游记",
          "古文运动",
          "宋代散文",
          "寄情山水",
          "与民同乐"
        ],
        "core_experience": "在简洁明净的文字中，随作者漫步山间，感受四时流转的自然之美，体味官场失意后于山水宴饮中寻得的平和与自适，获得一种清朗而深沉的审美与情感共鸣。",
        "experience_introduction": "《醉翁亭记》通过简淡自然的语言展现了一幅宋代文人寄情山水的典型画卷。作者以移步换景的笔法勾勒滁州山川景色，穿插太守与宾客、百姓同游宴饮的场景，使读者在阅读过程中体验到由景入情、由情入理的渐次深入。文章的情感基调以闲适愉悦为主，但背后隐含着失意后的自我调节，因此在轻松的表层下潜藏着一种深沉的人生感慨。这种复杂的情感结构使得读者既获得审美的愉悦，又能引发对人生境遇的共情与思考。"
      },
      "experience_vector": {
        "passion": 0.45,
        "healing": 0.70,
        "awe": 0.55,
        "nostalgia": 0.10,
        "reflection": 0.85,
        "romance": 0.00,
        "tension": 0.05,
        "warmth": 0.65,
        "loneliness": 0.20,
        "hope": 0.60
      },

        },

        },
        "emotion": {

          "loneliness": 0.20,

          "awe": 0.50,
          "nostalgia": 0.05,
          "hope": 0.60,

        },
        "aesthetic": {

          "brightness": 0.70,
          "dreamlike": 0.00,
          "mystery": 0.00,

        },
        "narrative": {
          "plot_complexity": 0.00,
          "character_depth": 0.50,
          "character_growth": 0.20,
          "world_building": 0.40,
          "nonlinear_structure": 0.05,
          "slow_immersion": 0.10,
          "action_intensity": 0.00,
          "conflict_intensity": 0.00,
          "philosophical_depth": 0.75
        },
        "social": {
          "individualism": 0.70,
          "collectivism": 0.60,

          "love": 0.00,

        },
        "value": {

          "truth": 0.30,
          "beauty": 0.90,
          "achievement": 0.10,
          "justice": 0.05,
          "sacrifice": 0.00,
          "self_exploration": 0.55,
          "tradition": 0.70,
          "change": 0.10,
          "survival": 0.00,
          "meaning": 0.75
        },
        "behavior": {
          "curiosity": 0.50,
          "creation": 0.80,
          "adventure": 0.30,
          "reflection": 0.90,
          "competition": 0.00,
          "social": 0.60,
          "discipline": 0.10,
          "risk": 0.00,
          "calm": 0.80,
          "escape": 0.65
        },
        "sensory": {

        }
      },
      "media_vector": {
        "literature_vector": {
          "literary_style": 0.90,
          "language_artistry": 0.95,
          "symbolism": 0.60,
          "rhetorical_complexity": 0.40,
          "intellectual_depth": 0.75,
          "cultural_depth": 0.70,
          "knowledge_density": 0.65,
          "interpretation_openness": 0.70
        }
      },
      "vector_facts": [
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.passion", "score": 0.45, "explanation": "文章情感以平和愉悦为主，热情并非主导。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.healing", "score": 0.70, "explanation": "山水之乐和与民同乐具有抚慰失意的作用。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.awe", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "对山水美景呈现一定的感叹与欣赏。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.nostalgia", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "并无怀旧回忆的内容。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.reflection", "score": 0.85, "explanation": "文章蕴含着对人生境遇和自我心境的深刻反思。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.romance", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "不涉及爱情题材。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.tension", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "整体气氛闲适，无明显紧张感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.warmth", "score": 0.65, "explanation": "与宾客、滁人同游的场面充满人情温暖。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.loneliness", "score": 0.20, "explanation": "虽自称醉翁，但处于群体之中，并不孤独。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.hope", "score": 0.60, "explanation": "在失意中依然寻找乐趣，传递出积极的人生态度。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.abstractness", "score": 0.75, "explanation": "借山水和饮酒表达超脱心境，具有较高的象征与抽象成分。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.complexity", "score": 0.45, "explanation": "结构清简、语言明净，思想复杂程度适中。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.depth_of_thought", "score": 0.80, "explanation": "融合了儒者情怀、贬谪感慨和人生思索，思想具有一定深度。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.logical_structure", "score": 0.35, "explanation": "采用游记式松散结构，不以严密逻辑见长。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.novelty", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "在宋代散文中属常见寄托之作，但情境独特。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.exploration", "score": 0.60, "explanation": "带领读者领略滁州山水，探索内心世界。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.ambiguity", "score": 0.30, "explanation": "表达清晰直白，少有模棱两可之处。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.predictability", "score": 0.45, "explanation": "行文自然流畅，不强求戏剧性转折。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.information_density", "score": 0.85, "explanation": "寥寥数百字包含山水、人情、哲理等多重信息。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.learning_value", "score": 0.80, "explanation": "有助于理解宋代文人精神、古文艺术和社会文化。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.personal_scale", "score": 0.80, "explanation": "全篇以个人感受和心境为核心。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.relationship_scale", "score": 0.60, "explanation": "描写了与宾客、百姓的关系互动。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.social_scale", "score": 0.50, "explanation": "体现了治理者与地方社会的和谐关系。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.civilization_scale", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "未涉及文明层面的宏观叙事。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.cosmic_scale", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "不涉及宇宙或宏大时空观念。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.time_span", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "聚焦于一日之游，时间跨度极小。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.fantasy_level", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "完全写实，无任何幻想成分。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.happiness", "score": 0.65, "explanation": "游山水、共饮宴中洋溢出真实的快乐。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.sadness", "score": 0.35, "explanation": "失意之情隐约流露，但不成为主调。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.loneliness", "score": 0.20, "explanation": "环境中人群熙攘，孤独感微弱。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.warmth", "score": 0.70, "explanation": "宴饮场面、同游之乐增进了温暖感受。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.fear", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无恐怖或忧惧的内容。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.tension", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "气氛整体松弛，无紧张感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.awe", "score": 0.50, "explanation": "对山水之美有一定赞叹。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.nostalgia", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "不指向过去或怀旧。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.hope", "score": 0.60, "explanation": "在逆境中寻找美好，隐含希望。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.melancholy", "score": 0.40, "explanation": "失意造成的淡淡忧伤若隐若现。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.anger", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "没有愤怒或怨恨的表达。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.peace", "score": 0.80, "explanation": "主导气氛为闲适、平和、安然。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.beauty", "score": 0.90, "explanation": "语言精美，写景如画，艺术美感极强。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.minimalism", "score": 0.85, "explanation": "文笔洗练，不尚辞藻堆砌，风格简淡。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.luxury", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "远离奢华，景致朴素。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.darkness", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "色调明丽，无黑暗气息。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.brightness", "score": 0.70, "explanation": "整体予人以明朗清丽之感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.dreamlike", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "不具梦幻或超现实色彩。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.mystery", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无神秘或悬疑氛围。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.experimental", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "遵循传统散文格式，非实验性创作。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.classical", "score": 0.95, "explanation": "纯然古典风范，典型的宋代文人美学。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.modern", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "不具备现代气质。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.plot_complexity", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无故事性情节。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.character_depth", "score": 0.50, "explanation": "通过醉翁形象展现了一定的内心世界。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.character_growth", "score": 0.20, "explanation": "无明显的人物成长弧线。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.world_building", "score": 0.40, "explanation": "描绘了具体的山水场景和人文环境。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.nonlinear_structure", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "按游览顺序展开，线性结构。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.slow_immersion", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "篇幅短小，沉浸进程较快。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.action_intensity", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无动作或打斗。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.conflict_intensity", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "不存在外在或内在的激烈冲突。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.philosophical_depth", "score": 0.75, "explanation": "在游记中融入了人生哲理的探讨。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.individualism", "score": 0.70, "explanation": "突出个人主观感受和自我安置。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.collectivism", "score": 0.60, "explanation": "表现出与民同乐、与群体共享的倾向。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.family", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "未涉及家庭关系。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.friendship", "score": 0.30, "explanation": "有宾客陪同，但友情非核心。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.love", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无爱情描写。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.community", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "表现地方社会的游览活动，有社区感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.competition", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无竞争或对抗。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.cooperation", "score": 0.30, "explanation": "共同游玩带有协作友好之意。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.power_relationship", "score": 0.20, "explanation": "隐含太守身份的治理关系，但被淡化。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.identity", "score": 0.65, "explanation": "以醉翁自况，涉及自我身份的重构。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.freedom", "score": 0.75, "explanation": "寄情山水、超脱公务，体现对内心自由的追求。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.order", "score": 0.40, "explanation": "滁人游玩秩序井然，暗示良好治理，但非主题。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.truth", "score": 0.30, "explanation": "并未刻意探求抽象真理。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.beauty", "score": 0.90, "explanation": "高度肯定山水和文章的美。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.achievement", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "不强调功业或成就。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.justice", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "无关正义或道德审判。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.sacrifice", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无牺牲主题。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.self_exploration", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "于饮酒赏景中探索内心世界。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.tradition", "score": 0.70, "explanation": "延续了文人游宴传统的书写模式。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.change", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "不强调变动或革新。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.survival", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无关生存威胁。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.meaning", "score": 0.75, "explanation": "通过山水之乐重新赋予人生意义。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.curiosity", "score": 0.50, "explanation": "出游本身带有一定的好奇心驱使。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.creation", "score": 0.80, "explanation": "创作这篇散文本身就是文学创造行为。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.adventure", "score": 0.30, "explanation": "登山览胜有小量冒险色彩。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.reflection", "score": 0.90, "explanation": "通篇充满对景、对情、对人生的反思。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.competition", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "无竞争行为。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.social", "score": 0.60, "explanation": "游宴是明显的社交活动。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.discipline", "score": 0.10, "explanation": "没有体现自律或刻苦。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.risk", "score": 0.00, "explanation": "不涉及风险。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.calm", "score": 0.80, "explanation": "整体行为表现为闲适、从容。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.escape", "score": 0.65, "explanation": "隐含着逃避政治失意的倾向。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.visual_intensity", "score": 0.60, "explanation": "对山、水、花、木等有直观的视觉描写。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.color_richness", "score": 0.50, "explanation": "因四时之景，出现不同色彩，用词清雅。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.sound_intensity", "score": 0.20, "explanation": "声音描写较少，仅有流水潺潺等轻微声响。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.rhythm_energy", "score": 0.40, "explanation": "文句节奏舒缓平和，能量偏低。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.atmosphere", "score": 0.75, "explanation": "营造出清幽、闲适的山林氛围。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.immersion", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "虽篇幅短小，但情境完整，易于代入。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.literature_vector.literary_style", "score": 0.90, "explanation": "语言简淡隽永，具有高度艺术化的古文风格。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.literature_vector.language_artistry", "score": 0.95, "explanation": "用词精准、句式优美，骈散结合，艺术性极强。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.literature_vector.symbolism", "score": 0.60, "explanation": "醉翁、山水皆蕴含象征意义。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.literature_vector.rhetorical_complexity", "score": 0.40, "explanation": "修辞并不繁复，以自然白描为主。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.literature_vector.intellectual_depth", "score": 0.75, "explanation": "蕴含关于人生、出处、物我关系的智性思考。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.literature_vector.cultural_depth", "score": 0.70, "explanation": "展现了北宋文人贬谪文化和山水游记传统。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.literature_vector.knowledge_density", "score": 0.65, "explanation": "在短章中浓缩了地理、风俗、哲理等信息。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.literature_vector.interpretation_openness", "score": 0.70, "explanation": "可作文学、政治、哲学等多重解读。" }
      ],
      "experience_vector_summary": {
        "experience_description": "阅读《醉翁亭记》的体验以闲适愉悦为基底，但深层流露出一种失意后的自适与淡淡的哀愁。读者首先被带入琅琊山的静美景色，随后参与太守与民同乐的宴饮场面，情绪逐渐从宁静转为温暖，最后在对人生意义的感悟中获得一种升华。整体体验如同一场短暂的山水漫步，轻松而不肤浅。",

        "cognitive_expression": "作品鼓励读者进行象征解读与内省思考。通过对山水、饮酒的描绘暗示深层的人生哲学，需要一定的联想能力。同时，文章信息密度较高，要求读者在简短的语句中提取地理、情感与思想等多重信息。",
        "behavioral_tendency_description": "文章所唤起的心理行为倾向主要是内省、静观和审美创造。它不驱动任何竞争、冒险或行动，而是吸引读者停驻于自然与文字的美之中，并鼓励一种豁达的生活态度。"

首先，确认类型：LITERATURE。因此媒体向量应使用 literature_vector。

作品 ID：work_chn_1007_001

基本信息：名称、类型、国家、年份（1046）。

简介：很简短，但提供了核心内容：贬谪期间，醉翁之意不在酒，在乎山水之间也。与民同乐。

这属于 LITERATURE 中的散文，古代散文名篇。我们可以据此推断各种维度。

我们需要生成完整的输出格式，包括 basic, semantic, experience_vector, psychology_vector, media_vector, vector_facts, experience_vector_summary, personality_affinity, supporting_evidence, quality_control。

按照要求，所有文字说明用中文，数值 0-1。

要注意，这是古代散文，篇幅短小，但意境深远，信息密度高，但文本量小。

现在逐一思考每个维度。

首先，cognitive 维度：

- abstractness：较高。此文通过亭、酒、山水表达人生哲理，寓志于景，象征意味强。但又不是完全抽象难懂，相对简洁。0.75左右
- complexity：文章结构精巧，但整体清丽，不算复杂。0.45
- depth_of_thought：蕴含政治失意、豁达、与民同乐等深层思想，深度较高。0.80
- logical_structure：文章信步而游，移步换景，松散自然，逻辑结构不强。0.35
- novelty：在宋代散文里，这种写景抒情议论结合是常见手法，但有其独特之处，但不算开创性重大新颖。0.55
- exploration：文章带领读者探索滁州山水之美，内心体验，有探索。0.60
- ambiguity：意境明确，不模糊。0.30
- predictability：内容结构自然，不刻意制造意外，但不俗套。0.45
- information_density：短文富含文化哲理和优美描写，密度高。0.85
- learning_value：学习古代散文写作、宋代文人心态、山水文化，学习价值高。0.80

personality_affinity 要基于 CPR 推断。

首先，它是一篇散文，表达个人心境，有哲学思考、内省、审美、逃避现实。可能吸引高 Ni、高 Fi，以及一定程度的 Si（传统审美）和 Ti（理解哲理）？但文章并不复杂逻辑推理，Ti 不高。Fe 因为与民同乐有社会和谐，不高不低。Ne 不大，因为想象逊于现实。Se 因为写景有感官，但不强烈。Assertive 较高，因为通透豁达，Turbulent 较低。但文章有淡淡的无奈，所以 Assertive 不宜极高。大概 Assertive 0.70，Turbulent 0.30。

根据规则，需要确保相对于其他维度有区分，不都 0.5。

processingState：因为只给了这一部作品，假设就这一部待处理，所以 processed: 1，remaining: 0，total: 1，currentWorkId 和 nextWorkId 应为 null（或 processed 后 currentWorkId 应为该作品，nextWorkId null），isCompleted: true。

但规范说 processingState 中 currentWorkId 是当前处理的 workId，nextWorkId 是下一个 workId，因为此作品完成，没有下一个，nextWorkId null，currentWorkId 可为 null 表示完成。可参考示例：完成时 currentWorkId null。这里我们在一开始处理，currentWorkId 为该作品，nextWorkId null，完成后 processed 1，total 1，isCompleted true。但因为我们一次性输出整个作品，processingState 应在 JSON 中表示当前状态，可能表示这个作品正在处理中。为简单，设置为 processed:1，remaining:0，currentWorkId null，nextWorkId null，isCompleted true。但这样 currentWorkId 必须为 null，符合示例。所以可以使用这种。

3. 详细记录了太守与宾客在山中亭宴饮娱乐的场面，包括射箭和弈棋。
4. 描写了滁人游玩的热闹场景，以及太守与百姓同乐的关系。
5. 运用“醉翁之意不在酒，在乎山水之间也”揭示寄情山水的主旨。
6. 文章结构随着游览路线展开，从山行到坐亭观景，移步换景。
7. 以“四时之景不同，而乐亦无穷也”概括了四季变化的丰富感受。
8. 结尾自述“太守谓谁？庐陵欧阳修也”，点明作者身份与贬谪经历。
9. 语言简洁隽永，运用骈散结合的句法，富有节奏美感。
10. 表达了即使政治失意，仍可通过自然和与民同乐获得精神寄托。

这些就够了。

还有 vector_facts，需要为每个数值维度生成一个事实。我将在 JSON 中详细列出。每个 dimensionPath 如 "psychology_vector.cognitive.abstractness" 等。按照规范必须包括 experience_vector 的所有10个字段，psychology_vector 所有组，media_vector 所有字段。可以提供一个数组，每个对象有 dimensionPath, score, explanation。 explanation 要简短。我将在输出中构造。
